minecraft:lore: {"text": "功能: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "提升鱼的星级", "color": "yellow", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "大幅增加钓到金星和钻石星鱼的概率。", "color": "gray", "italic": false}

{"text": "", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "bold": false, "extra": [{"text": "主手", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "拿"}, {"text": "钓竿", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "、"}, {"text": "副手", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "拿"}, {"text": "渔具", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "，"}, {"text": "潜行", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "加"}, {"text": "右键", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "即可装上渔具。"}]}

{"text": "", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "bold": false, "extra": [{"text": "主手", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "拿装有渔具的"}, {"text": "钓竿", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "、"}, {"text": "副手", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "空出", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "，"}, {"text": "潜行", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "加"}, {"text": "右键", "color": "green", "bold": true}, {"text": "即可取出渔具。"}]}
